creativeHypothesis: A real reviewer circles one weak line, reads why it fails search, moves existing proof up, then reveals a score receipt.
benchmarkMechanics: Business Insider resume expert teardown: concrete resume on screen, blunt but useful feedback.
Jerry Lee / Wonsulting recruiter search tests: show what a recruiter searches for instead of explaining ATS myths.
High-performing career shorts: one problem, immediate artifact, no setup, fast useful payoff.

humanRead.direction: Sharp recruiter reading a resume line out loud; slightly amused, not corporate, not product-demo.

scriptGate.specificWeakBullet: Created reports for business teams and leadership.
visibleScoreRationale: Tool match: reports only -> SQL + Tableau
scriptGate.cta: Run the free Signal score before you apply.

approvalGate.reviewInstructions: Approve only if the script reads like a human reviewer, the score feels earned, and the visuals are not boring or AI-slop.
